productName: CQ - CQ-300mg-Old Fashioned Lemonade - Lemon - 1:1:1 THC:CBC:CBG - 63m
description: A bold sweet-tart lemonade infused shot — compact, flavorful, and mixed like a tiny craft cocktail for a quick edible-style experience. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect, and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity in a 1:1:1 ratio. A refreshing hybrid option for customers who prefer their cannabis in a drinkable format.
